features.name: Material Sense

features.name: Perfect Senses
features.description: Supernatural precision for sounds, time, location, and musical notes

features.name: Eidetic Memory
features.description: Make Intelligence checks to recall any previously encountered information perfectly

features.description: Make Communication checks to converse with animals and sense plant health

features.description: Make Intelligence checks to predict weather patterns up to 24 hours

features.name: Multi-limbed
features.description: Additional limbs for enhanced manipulation

features.description: Own a vehicle for quick travel

features.description: Access to home supporting more than yourself

features.description: Seal items in protective field to prevent tampering

features.description: Someone owes you something significant

features.description: Prophecy involves you, believers assist
